hooks.command: file_path=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); filename=$(basename "$file_path"); case "$filename" in *.env|*.properties) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Reading env/properties files is not allowed"}}'; exit 0 ;; esac; case "$filename" in .env*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Reading env/properties files is not allowed"}}'; exit 0 ;; esac; exit 0
